tasks.label: make gtest
tasks.command: cmake -DWITH_DEBUG=YES -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug . && make -j$(sysctl -n hw.logicalcpu) DSTfits gTest_version gTest_manager gTest_hdu gTest_FitsImage && dsymutil build/exe/gTest_version build/exe/gTest_manager build/exe/gTest_hdu build/exe/gTest_FitsImage 2>/dev/null || true
